case_title: JOSEPH MARASCO VS. ANN FREEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARASCO, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREEMAN, ANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 672 MINNA STREET, UNIT #B, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
